summary: S&P 500 +0.4%, Dow +184pts, Nasdaq +0.3% on May 1. April was best month since 2020. Apple up 3%+ on earnings beat. Q1 GDP 2.0% vs 2.3% expected, PCE inflation at 3.5%.
